name: Malecite-Passamaquoddy

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Malecite-Passamaquoddy (male1292).

notes: Skeleton. Algic (Eastern Algonquian) language of Maine and New Brunswick in the standard Passamaquoddy-Maliseet orthography. The digraph-free letters c=[tʃ] and q=[kʷ] are mapped; stops and s are voiceless underlyingly but voice intervocalically, which is left unencoded. Vowel length and stress are not marked in this practical orthography and are left unencoded, raising the PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Malecite-Passamaquoddy (male1292)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
